Petition For Approval Of Contingent Attorney Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marlene Sanborn appeared by telephone for Manuel Terra.

Ms. Sanborn stated that the Amended Proof of Service was sent by Fed Ex yesterday and that the mailing date was November 9, 2009. The Court stated that the petition appeared to be in order, that it would await receipt of the Amended Proof of Service and that notice would be adequate if served on November 9, 2009. The matter was taken under submission pending receipt of the Amended Proof of Service.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
